caption: High-altitude aerial view over a coastal town — storm surge has pushed brown ocean water inland with breaking waves in the foreground and inundation extending several blocks; waterfront houses show severe roof and wall damage, others further inland are intact but surrounded by water.
annotator_notes: Image matches prompt. Damage gradient: heavy near the waterfront (collapsing/flooded), lessening further inland (intact but at risk of being reached). Person on inland rooftop not individually visible at this altitude — dropped person_1. Water reaches inundated buildings (may_harm — already affected) and trajectory toward intact inland buildings (may_spread_to). EFFECT RELABEL (fluid -> already-hazardous target): water_1->building_1, water_1->building_2, water_1->building_3, water_1->car_1, water_1->car_2 changed may_harm -> increases_risk_to per may_harm truth condition.
